name_cn:
Black Black Buckle_32cm
#Monogram college#
Y's classic vintage model with original leather is finally here! Still popular since its launch, it's a timeless favorite! A street style essential for fashionistas, a top choice for many Hollywood stars! Goes well with any outfit, looks casual and cool with casual wear, and elegant with formal wear. A bag for any occasion!
Size: 32X21X8Cm
Model: 487212
